description:
Identify the simulation second with the highest number of halting vehicles in the Bologna Pasubio scenario (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg). If multiple time steps share the same maximum halting value, select the earliest time. Save a simulation state checkpoint at that exact second to ~/SUMO_Output/peak_state.xml. Document the findings in a plain-text file at ~/SUMO_Output/peak_report.txt containing exactly two lines in this format:
Peak_Time: <value>
Max_Halting: <value>
